name: 15q22_SMAD3_SD
description: SMAD3 (Loeys-Dietz syndrome type 3, aneurysm-osteoarthritis) at 15q22.33 is flanked by ~5-20 kb directly-oriented SDs at 92-96% identity that drive rare intragenic deletions and a recurrent ~1 Mb 15q22 microdeletion. The proximal flank harbours SMAD6 paralog footprints shared with chr6 SMAD-family loci.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-20 kb directly-oriented SDs at 92-96% identity flanking SMAD3; intragenic Alu-Alu pairs drive small deletions.
